topPlaces.name: Manvila
topPlaces.description: Manvila (Monvila) is a place in Trivandrum, the capital city of Kerala. It is located between Sreekaryam and Kulathoor.

topPlaces.name: Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre
topPlaces.description: The Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre (VSSC) is a major space research centre of ISRO, focusing on rocket and space vehicles for India's satellite programme. It is located in Thiruvananthapuram, in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kuzhivila
topPlaces.description: Kuzhivila is a locality in the northwest of Thiruvananthapuram city, Kerala, India. It is located along the Kazhakoottam - Kovalam highway bypass.

topPlaces.name: Technopark, Trivandrum
topPlaces.description: Technopark is a technology park in Thiruvananthapuram in the state of Kerala, India. Conceptualized in 1990 by the Government of Kerala, under chief minister E K Nayanar, it is the largest information technology (IT) park in Asia in terms of area.

topPlaces.name: Thumba Equatorial Rocket Launching Station
topPlaces.description: Thumba Equatorial Rocket Launching Station (TERLS) is India's first rocket launching station and was established on 21 November 1963. Operated by ISRO, it is located in Thumba, Thiruvananthapuram, which is near the southwestern tip of mainland India, very close to Earth's magnetic equator.

topPlaces.name: Thumba
topPlaces.description: Thumba is a coastal area of Thiruvananthapuram city, the capital of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Kazhakoottam
topPlaces.description: Kazhakkoottam is a major urban area in the city of Thiruvananthapuram, India. The largest IT park in the country in terms of developed area, Technopark, along with Technocity-an upcoming integrated IT township-is situated at 6km North of kazhakkoottam.

topPlaces.name: Kariavattom
topPlaces.description: Kariavattom is an area of Trivandrum city the capital of Kerala, India. Trivandrum International Stadium the largest international stadium of Kerala is situated in Karyavattom.

items.note: Manvila (Monvila) is a place in Trivandrum, the capital city of Kerala. It is located between Sreekaryam and Kulathoor.

The Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre (VSSC) is a major space research centre of ISRO, focusing on rocket and space vehicles for India's satellite programme. It is located in Thiruvananthapuram, in the Indian state of Kerala.
Kuzhivila is a locality in the northwest of Thiruvananthapuram city, Kerala, India. It is located along the Kazhakoottam - Kovalam highway bypass.

Technopark is a technology park in Thiruvananthapuram in the state of Kerala, India. Conceptualized in 1990 by the Government of Kerala, under chief minister E K Nayanar, it is the largest information technology (IT) park in Asia in terms of area.

Thumba Equatorial Rocket Launching Station (TERLS) is India's first rocket launching station and was established on 21 November 1963. Operated by ISRO, it is located in Thumba, Thiruvananthapuram, which is near the southwestern tip of mainland India, very close to Earth's magnetic equator.
Thumba is a coastal area of Thiruvananthapuram city, the capital of Kerala, India.

Kazhakkoottam is a major urban area in the city of Thiruvananthapuram, India. The largest IT park in the country in terms of developed area, Technopark, along with Technocity-an upcoming integrated IT township-is situated at 6km North of kazhakkoottam.
Kariavattom is an area of Trivandrum city the capital of Kerala, India. Trivandrum International Stadium the largest international stadium of Kerala is situated in Karyavattom.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kolathukara shiva temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kolathukara shiva temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kolathukara shiva temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (8 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (10 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kolathukara shiva temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kolathukara shiva temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kolathukara shiva temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kolathukara shiva temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kolathukara shiva temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Manvila, Vikram Sarabhai Space Centre, Kuzhivila, Technopark, Trivandrum, Thumba Equatorial Rocket Launching Station.
